title: Associate Account Director
description:
The Opportunity

We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Account Director to join a global business, incredible team, with the opportunity to support two major clients.

This is a strategic role focused on how brands live and breathe across digital and traditional channels.

This is an award-winning integrated agency dedicated to moving brands forward with purpose and excellence.

What You’ll Be Doing:

  • Campaign Implementation: Act as the "engine room" for multiple workstreams. You will help manage the end-to-end delivery of EDMs, Websites, and integrated Brand Campaigns.
  • Omni-Channel Consistency: Ensure brand messaging remains seamless and high-quality across every touchpoint, from landing pages to large-scale brand pushes.
  • Client Relationship Management: Serve as a key day-to-day contact or 2 legacy clients.
  • Brand Stewardship: Develop a deep understanding of the client’s brand guidelines to ensure every deliverable is on-point and strategically aligned.
  • Project Coordination: Manage timelines, status reports, an internal workflows to keep projects moving forward efficiently.

About You:

  • Campaign Specialist: Your background and interest lie in integrated marketing and campaign delivery. We are specifically looking for someone with non-events focus.
  • Agency Experience: Ideally, you have 5 years of experience in an agency or marketing role. Experience within a Digital or Social agency is a strong advantage but not essential.
  • Client-Ready: You are a strong communicator who is organized, proactive, and comfortable working with sophisticated clients.
  • Detail-Oriented: you have a sharp eye for quality control and a passion for efficient execution.

If this sounds like you, we'd love to receive your application for review.

EA License No.: R1657232

Agency License No.: 11C4388

postedCompany.description:
Aspire specialises in recruiting for the media and marketing communications industry. We help change people's lives and improve business performance.

We have a 96% success rate of placing the right people into the right role. We act as both a brand embassador for our employer customers, and a trusted recruitment partner for our candidates. We are a 'high touch' consultancy who believes in meeting face to face in order to fully understand your requirements, whether it is hiring new staff or looking for the next career move.

Established since 1992, Aspire has over two decades of heritage in our specialist areas, so our dedicated consltas are well positioned to help.

Aspire has developed an international presence with offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, London and Manchester for employers and individuals with global aspirations. Aspire has been operating in Asia since November 2011, facilitating the movement of talent, locally, regionally and at a global level. Aspire is also ISO 9001 accredited, an investors in People Gold Award Company, a Sunday Times Top 100 company to work, members of APSCo Asia and we are always interested in talking to media & marketing communications professionals as well as those who are considering a career in recruitment with us at Aspire.
postedCompany.name: ASPIRE GLOBAL NETWORK PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
